description: Use this API to return an array of integer values for subsystem substation terminals. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.1.0. ierr, iarray = aterminalint(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem substations to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the substation switching device quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: iarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

string.description: Number of the node to which the terminal is connected.
Number of the bus to which the terminal’s node is connected.
Section number of the bus to which the terminal’s node is connected.
Number of another bus connected to this device; returned as 0 except for two- terminal branches and three-winding transformers.
Section number of another bus connected to this device; returned as 0 except for two-terminal branches and three-winding transformers.
Number of another bus connected to this device; returned as 0 except for three-winding transformers.
Section number of another bus connected to this device; returned as 0 except for three-winding transformers.

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of IARRAY, is not large enough.
